title: VitalStats
description: A lightweight client-side mod that displays health indicators, armor HUD, and a Totem of Undying counter for improved combat awareness.
body:
#  **VitalStats**
A lightweight client-side mod that displays health indicators, armor HUD, and a Totem of Undying counter for improved combat awareness.

![Mod Preview](https://i.imgur.com/TwlTz1s.png)

## ✨ Features

### ❤️ Health indicator with two display modes:

Heart icons

Numeric health values

### 🔮 Totem Counter

Counts Totem of Undying pops

Automatically resets on respawn or world change

Supports name suffix display type (e.g. PlayerName ¦ 2)

### 🛡️ Armor HUD

Displays armor values directly on the HUD

Designed to align cleanly with existing VitalStats elements

### 🚫 Entity blacklist

Hide health indicators for specific entities

### ⚙️ Customizable HUD offsets

Fine-tune positioning for all indicators
